<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please keep PRs focused. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why is it needed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (parser / collector / analysis / export)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
